message:
test(fixtures): pin CLUSTER/CLIENT/ACL/CONNECTION wire goldens

Updates the conformance fixture goldens to match upstream Redis 7's
exact wire replies for the subcommand and ACL-LOG changes landed in
the previous commit ("CLUSTER/CLIENT/ACL subcommand + error-message
parity").

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_acl.json
  * `acl_log_empty` case renamed to `acl_log_shows_recent_failed_auth_attempts`
    and promoted from `[]` expectation to a full Redis-7 entry array
    with every new field: count, reason, context, object, username,
    client-info, entry-id, age-seconds, created-at, updated-at.
    Now verifies we populate all fields, not just that the reply is
    non-empty.
  * Adds new cases exercising ACL LOG RESET, ACL LOG <count>, ACL
    LOG <count> malformed-arg error; all keyed to the runtime's new
    entry shape.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_cluster.json
  * Golden strings updated to the exact
    "ERR wrong number of arguments for 'cluster|<name>' command"
    and "ERR unknown subcommand '<name>'. Try CLUSTER HELP." forms.
  * Adds scenarios per subcommand (CLUSTER NODES, SLOTS, SHARDS,
    COUNTKEYSINSLOT, GETKEYSINSLOT, MYID, LINKS, RESET, FORGET,
    FLUSHSLOTS, BUMPEPOCH, SET-CONFIG-EPOCH, ADDSLOTS, DELSLOTS,
    ADDSLOTSRANGE, DELSLOTSRANGE) to lock the per-subcommand error
    against upstream.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_client.json
  * Analogous per-subcommand wrong-arity goldens for CLIENT LIST,
    CLIENT KILL, CLIENT PAUSE, CLIENT UNPAUSE, CLIENT REPLY,
    CLIENT SETNAME, CLIENT GETNAME, CLIENT ID, CLIENT NO-EVICT,
    CLIENT NO-TOUCH, CLIENT INFO, CLIENT TRACKINGINFO, CLIENT
    TRACKING.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_connection.json
  * Minor golden adjustments so HELLO/AUTH/RESET/PING replies keep
    parity with upstream after the auth/argc rework shipped in the
    command/runtime commit.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/fr_p2c_007_cluster_journey.json
  * Cluster-journey packet regenerated against the new CLUSTER
    error wording — identical logical coverage, different bytes.

No code change in this commit — pure fixture realignment so CI
catches upstream drift if anyone regresses the new goldens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
